title: Creamy Midnight-Craving Peruvian French Lentil Stir-fry
description: A fresh and creamy peruvian dish featuring french lentils with a touch of pickled flavor, perfect for those midnight cravings. Low-carb friendly.

ingredients.name: Pickled Shallots
ingredients.notes: For a more intense flavor, use finely chopped pickled shallots.

instructions: Rinse the French Lentils under cold water.
In a small saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add rinsed lentils to the pan with garlic and stir well to coat them in the oil-garlic mixture.
Pour in heavy cream and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, stirring occasionally until it thickens slightly. Add pickled shallots, salt, and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish or on top of steamed vegetables.
